on_screen_text:
Arjun: Priya yaar... 😔 [Priya, my friend...]
Arjun: Aaj neha ne mujhe reject kar diya [Today Neha rejected me]
Arjun: Maine bola "i am loving since long time" [I said "i am loving since long time"]
Arjun: Usne hans k bola "pehle English sikh lo" [She laughed and said "learn English first"]
Arjun: Dost bhi the waha pe... Bahut beizzati hui 😭 [Friends were also there... It was very embarrassing]
Priya: Arjun, haar mat maan ✨ [Arjun, don't give up]
Priya: Maine bhi pehle teri jaisi English boli thi [I also used to speak English like you before]
Priya: Par MySivi app use karke sab badal gaya [But using MySivi app changed everything]
Arjun: MySivi??? 🤨 [MySivi???]
Priya: Haan! Yahan AI teacher Arya hai [Yes! There is an AI teacher named Arya here]
Priya: Roz bas 15 minute usse baat karo, bilkul dost ki tarah [Just talk to her for 15 minutes daily, just like a friend]
Priya: Galti hui? Judge nahi karti, sirf correct karti hai [Made a mistake? She doesn't judge, she only corrects]
Arjun: Matlab ab bhi hope hai?? 🥺 [Does that mean there is still hope??]
Priya: Bilkul! 💪 [Absolutely!]
Priya: 2 hafte practice kar... teri English itni improve hogi ki Neha khud impressed ho jayegi [Practice for 2 weeks... your English will improve so much that Neha herself will be impressed]
Arjun: Par ye toh expensive hoga na? [But this must be expensive, right?]
Priya: nhi, Sirf ₹1!! [No, only ₹1!!]
Arjun: Wow! 🙌 [Wow!]
Arjun: Mai bhi abhi download karta hu [I am downloading it right now]
Arjun: 2 hafte baad neha ko perfect English me propose karunga 🤩 [I will propose to Neha in perfect English after 2 weeks]
Priya: All the best! MySivi download kar aur shuru ho ja 💖 [All the best! Download MySivi and get started]
End card: Great! Download MySivi. I'll see you there!
summary: A simulated WhatsApp chat shows Arjun sharing his embarrassment after being rejected by Neha for poor English. Priya recommends the MySivi app, highlighting its non-judgmental AI teacher Arya available for just ₹1. Arjun is motivated to download the app to improve his English and propose again.
